title: Senior Loyalty Strategist
description:
Lead end-to-end loyalty strategy engagements for global retail and aviation clients. Own the diagnostic, design, and roadmap phases. Work directly with the founder on programme P&L modelling, partner economics, and board-level recommendations.

We are looking for someone with 6+ years of loyalty strategy experience, ideally inside a top-tier consultancy or as an in-house program owner. Exposure to GCC markets is a strong plus.

title: Loyalty Implementation Lead
description:
Run multi-vendor loyalty platform implementations from kickoff to first reward. You will manage technology partners, integration teams, and client product owners through a structured 90-day playbook.

Must have hands-on experience with at least two of: Salesforce Loyalty, Antavo, Talon.One, Comarch, SAP. Bilingual English/Arabic preferred but not required.

title: Loyalty Data Analyst
description: Build the analytical backbone of our consulting engagements. SQL fluency is non-negotiable; Python and dbt are pluses. You will work on liability modelling, segmentation, RFM analysis, and incrementality testing across client datasets.
